name: google-analytics-ga4
description: Track Google Analytics 4 events from Codex through a local MCP server.

interface.longDescription: A local MCP bridge that lets Codex send Google Analytics 4 Measurement Protocol events for testing and lightweight automation flows.
defaultPrompt: Send a GA4 test event for my landing page CTA
Track a signup event with custom parameters
Validate my GA4 Measurement Protocol setup
